      "description": "Fixing 3 year contract pull back (1 month)",
      "dynamicChoiceSets": [],
      "environments": [
        "Default"
      ],
      "exitRules": [],
      "experiments": [],
      "formulas": [
        {
          "dataType": "Number",
          "description": "DATE( YEAR( {!Nothing.CloseDate}) + 1 , MONTH( {!Nothing.CloseDate}) , DAY( {!Nothing.CloseDate}) ) - {!TodayDate}",
          "expression": "(\n  IF(\n    AND(\n      MONTH({!Loop_Through_Opportunities.CloseDate}) = 2,\n      DAY({!Loop_Through_Opportunities.CloseDate}) = 29\n    ),\n    DATE(YEAR({!Loop_Through_Opportunities.CloseDate}) + 1, 3, 1), \n    DATE(\n      YEAR({!Loop_Through_Opportunities.CloseDate}) + 1,\n      MONTH({!Loop_Through_Opportunities.CloseDate}),\n      DAY({!Loop_Through_Opportunities.CloseDate})\n    )\n  )\n) - {!TodayDate}",
          "name": "[BLOCKED: Base64 encoded data]",
          "processMetadataValues": [],
          "scale": 0
        },
        {
          "dataType": "Date",
          "description": "DATE( YEAR( {!Loop_Through_Opportunities.CloseDate}) + 1 , MONTH( {!Loop_Through_Opportunities.CloseDate} ) , DAY( {!Loop_Through_Opportunities.CloseDate}) )\n\nIF(\n  ISBLANK({!Loop_Through_Opportunities.CloseDate}),\n  NULL,\n  ADDMONTHS(\n    {!Loop_Through_Opportunities.CloseDate},\n    IF(\n      AND({!NewContractYear} = \"Year 2\", {!NewCycleCount} = 1),\n      11,\n      12\n    )\n  )\n)",
          "expression": "IF(\n  ISBLANK({!Loop_Through_Opportunities.CloseDate}),\n  NULL,\n  ADDMONTHS(\n    {!Loop_Through_Opportunities.CloseDate},\n    IF(\n      AND(\n        CONTAINS(TEXT({!Loop_Through_Opportunities.Contract_Length__c}), \"3\"),\n        {!NewContractYear} = \"Year 2\",\n        BLANKVALUE({!NewCycleCount}, 0) = 1\n      ),\n      11,\n      12\n    )\n  )\n)",
          "name": "NewCloseDate",
          "processMetadataValues": [],
          "scale": null
        },
        {
          "dataType": "String",
          "description": "IF(\n  TEXT({!Loop_Through_Opportunities.Contract_Year__c}) = \"Year 1\",\n  \"Year 2\",\n  IF(\n    TEXT({!Loop_Through_Opportunities.Contract_Year__c}) = \"Year 2\",\n    \"Year 3\",\n    \"Year 1\"\n  )\n)",
          "expression": "IF(\n  CONTAINS(TEXT({!Loop_Through_Opportunities.Contract_Length__c}), \"3\"),\n  CASE(\n    TEXT({!Loop_Through_Opportunities.Contract_Year__c}),\n    \"Year 1\",\"Year 2\",\n    \"Year 2\",\"Year 3\",\n    \"Year 3\",\"Year 1\",\n    \"Year 2\"\n  ),\n  \"Year 1\"\n)",
          "name": "NewContractYear",
          "processMetadataValues": [],
          "scale": null
        },
        {
          "dataType": "Number",
          "description": "IF(\n  TEXT({!Loop_Through_Opportunities.Contract_Year__c}) = \"3\",\n  {!Loop_Through_Opportunities.Cycle_Count__c} + 1,\n  {!Loop_Through_Opportunities.Cycle_Count__c}\n)",
          "expression": "IF(\n  CONTAINS(TEXT({!Loop_Through_Opportunities.Contract_Length__c}), \"3\"),\n  IF(\n    {!NewContractYear} = \"Year 1\",\n    BLANKVALUE({!Loop_Through_Opportunities.Cycle_Count__c},0) + 1,\n    IF(\n      ISBLANK({!Loop_Through_Opportunities.Cycle_Count__c}),\n      1,\n      {!Loop_Through_Opportunities.Cycle_Count__c}\n    )\n  ),\n  BLANKVALUE({!Loop_Through_Opportunities.Cycle_Count__c},0) + 1\n)",
          "name": "NewCycleCount",
          "processMetadataValues": [],
          "scale": 0
        },
        {
          "dataType": "Date",
          "description": null,
          "expression": "TODAY()",
          "name": "TodayDate",
          "processMetadataValues": [],
          "scale": null
        }
      ],
